task_description: Pre-Phase 41 cleanup: delete 10 stub services, update CI/CD and Helm to remove references, upgrade Razorpay/UPI payment services to real SDK, backfill phase log for phases 18-40, run all 6 gates, tag and commit.

verification.summary: All 6 gates pass: install (1.6s), typecheck (88/88), test (91/91), build (63/63), lint (73/73), audit (0 high, 8 moderate+low). Tests properly exercise both Razorpay live mode (HMAC-SHA256) and fallback mode. Docker build skipped (no Docker daemon in sandbox). 309 LOC of code changes (well within 500 LOC budget).
